sections.paragraph:
Rape Law imposes death penalty for
Deu 22:27
Captives afflicted with
Isa 13:16; Lam 5:11; Zec 14:2
Instances of:
- Of the servant of a Levite, by Benjamites; tribe of Benjamin nearly exterminated by the army of the other tribes, as punishment for
Jdg 19:30; Jdg 20:35
- Of Tamar by Amnon; avenged in the death of Amnon at the hand of Absalom, Tamar's brother
2Sa 13:29; 2Sa 13:33
